title: PSYCHIATRIC SERVICES - 211info
text: ROSEBURG PSYCHIATRIC SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides treatment-resistant depression psychiatric services such as Ketamine-Assisted Psychotherapy and Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS) 621 W Madrone Street Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Individuals living with treatment-resistant depression Hours: Monday-Thursday 7am-6pm, Friday 7am-5pm (541) 440-3500 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 440-3500 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Accepts most major insurance plans, Oregon Health Plan and Medicare. Offers a sliding scale fee for uninsured patients DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Coos, Curry, Douglas, and Josephine Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Psychiatric Medication Services Other Services Offered At This Location: OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - MOBILE MEDICAL CLINIC SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - FAMILY AND BEHAVIORAL MEDICINE SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ADDICTION SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ROSEBURG
